questionHtml: The refractive indices of the glass and cladding are only slightly different. Suggest why this is desirable.
markschemeHtml:
to have a critical angle close to 90° ✔

so only rays parallel to the axis are transmitted ✔

to reduce waveguide/modal dispersion ✔

meta.title: The refractive indices of the glass and cladding are only slightly different. Suggest why this is desirable.
